chapter_title.en: In response to Talha and Zubayr''s complaint for not consulting them in the affairs

parts.text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) كلم به طلحة
الزبير بعد بيعته بالخلافة وقد عتبا عليه من ترك مشورتهما والاستعانة في

en.sayed-ali-raza: After swearing allegiance to Amīr al-mu’minīn, Ṭalḥah and az-Zubayr complained to him that he had not consulted them or sought their assistance in the affairs (of state). Amīr al-mu’minīn replied:
